key_directories.ddl/: Extracted DDL files from setup-ddl (tables.sql, procedures.sql, views.sql, functions.sql)
key_directories.catalog/: Catalog JSON files — tables/, procedures/, views/, functions/ subdirectories

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring the project. It is the primary startup context for structure and conventions.
notes_for_agents.catalog_mandatory: discover and scoping tools require catalog/ files from setup-ddl. Errors if catalog is missing.
notes_for_agents.ddl_filenames: The loader auto-detects object types from CREATE statements — .sql filenames are not significant.
notes_for_agents.mssql_env_vars: Live SQL Server access requires MSSQL_HOST, MSSQL_PORT, MSSQL_DB, SA_PASSWORD exported before launching claude.
